results.title: OpenClaw Release Notes - May 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
results.description: Gateway/skills: preflight remote macOS skill-bin refreshes with a WebSocket connectivity check so stale node sessions skip quickly instead of logging slow system.which timeout warnings. CLI/config: keep broken discovered plugins that are not referenced by active config from failing openclaw config validate, while preserving fatal errors for explicitly configured plugin entries. GitHub Copilot: drop unsafe native Responses reasoning replay items with non-replayable IDs before dispatch, preventing affected Copilot sessions from failing with invalid_request_body.
